actions.text: Demo 8: Image Generation — text-to-image built in
Generate an image of a futuristic city skyline at sunset with flying cars. Save it as city.png
actions.subtitle: Describe what you need — agy generates it inline
GenerateImage() tool creates the image on-the-fly
Use cases: UI mockups, app icons, diagrams, placeholders

actions.text: No external tools needed — image gen is built into agy
